notes: Gaussian C-vine conditional MPI (closed-form partial-correlation recursion, Gauss-Jordan inverse, no MLE/ML). Host EURUSD(0) + partners GBPUSD(1)/AUDUSD(2)/NZDUSD(3); NDX(4) optional cross-asset partner. Partners via QM_BasketOpenPosition. Warmup via QM_SymbolGuardInit+QM_BasketWarmupHistory. Closed-form/deterministic, NO ML, no external feed. All legs in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.
